title: VanillaQOLPlus
description: A dead simple modpack targeting performance and quality of life gains.
body:
A dead simple modpack targeting performance and quality of life gains.

## Features
### Sodium and Performance.
This modpack comes preinstalled with Sodium to ensure the best performance with your gameplay. A few other performance mods are installed such as, Clumps, Dynamic FPS, and Entity Culling. 

### Controllers
Enjoy playing with a controller? Kick back and relax with an authentic legacy vibe with controller support and a Legacy Edition Resource Pack!

### ZOOOOOOOOOOM
Zooooooooooom is including, but may need to be bound.

### Capes
Be able to view capes from Optifine, LabyMod, and the MinecraftCapes mod!

### Shaders
Use your favorite shader packs with Iris! A few shader packs come preinstalled including: BSL Shaders, and Complementary Shaders - Reimagined. 

### Resource Packs
Classic Java Edition Resource Packs such as Faithful 32x and Doku's RPG come preinstalled. Legacy Edition Texture Packs including Fantasy, Natural, City, and Plastic Texture Packs are including to provide a nostalgic experience.
